languages.text: Свет преломляется и танцует на острых гранях декоративной отделки трона. Любая попытка взобраться на него чревата неприятными последствиями.

traits.locale_text: Свет преломляется и танцует на острых гранях декоративной отделки трона. Любая попытка взобраться на него чревата неприятными последствиями.

languages.text: The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.
languages.original_text: Свет преломляется и танцует на острых гранях декоративной отделки трона. Любая попытка взобраться на него чревата неприятными последствиями.

traits.locale_text: The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.
The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.
The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.

languages.text: La luz se refracta y parece danzar en los afilados remates del trono, prometiendo una serie de consecuencias nada placenteras para cualquiera que lo ocupe.
languages.original_text: The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.

traits.locale_text: La luz se refracta y parece danzar en los afilados remates del trono, prometiendo una serie de consecuencias nada placenteras para cualquiera que lo ocupe.

languages.text: 光芒在宝座锋利的装饰性边缘折射舞动，仿佛在发出警告：若谁胆敢坐上去，必将付出惨痛代价。
languages.original_text: The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.

traits.locale_text: 光芒在宝座锋利的装饰性边缘折射舞动，仿佛在发出警告：若谁胆敢坐上去，必将付出惨痛代价。

languages.text: La lumière se reflète et danse sur les arêtes tranchantes des finitions décoratives du trône, promesse de conséquences déplaisantes pour quiconque tenterait de s'asseoir dessus.
languages.original_text: The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.

traits.locale_text: La lumière se reflète et danse sur les arêtes tranchantes des finitions décoratives du trône, promesse de conséquences déplaisantes pour quiconque tenterait de s'asseoir dessus.

languages.text: Işık kırılıyor ve tahtın dekoratif kaplamasının keskin kenarlarında dans ederek ona oturmaya kalkışacak herkes için hoş olmayan sonuçlar vaat ediyor.
languages.original_text: The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.

traits.locale_text: Işık kırılıyor ve tahtın dekoratif kaplamasının keskin kenarlarında dans ederek ona oturmaya kalkışacak herkes için hoş olmayan sonuçlar vaat ediyor.

languages.text: 光が王座の装飾の鋭い縁に屈折して踊り、誰かが座ろうとする者には不快な結果をもたらすことを暗示している。
languages.original_text: The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.

traits.locale_text: 光が王座の装飾の鋭い縁に屈折して踊り、誰かが座ろうとする者には不快な結果をもたらすことを暗示している。

languages.text: Das gebrochene Licht tanzt auf den scharfen Kannten der Verzierungen des Throns und verspricht jedem, der es wagt, sich auf ihn zu setzen, unangenehme Konsequenzen.
languages.original_text: The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.

traits.locale_text: Das gebrochene Licht tanzt auf den scharfen Kannten der Verzierungen des Throns und verspricht jedem, der es wagt, sich auf ihn zu setzen, unangenehme Konsequenzen.
